allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
TICKET-001 & 002: Hero section category reframe and CTA restructure

- Update headline from "Protocol and Systems Design" to "AI-Native Venture Studio"
- Update tagline to "Governed Autonomous Capital"
- Change subhead to explain formation model clearly
- Replace CTAs: "Build with Splice" and "Read the Thesis"
- Update footer tagline to "Evidence before scale · Governed by design · Founder-first economics"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
TICKET-003 & 004: Remove banned phrases and align values with memo

- Remove "Enterprise-Grade" \(banned phrase per memo\)
- Restructure VALUES to match memo''s six differentiation points:
  - Vertical Focus, Founder-First Economics, Venture Production OS
  - Governed AI Infrastructure, Portfolio Commons, Evidence Before Scale

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
